name: Cock Guesser
description:
The bot this is based on: https://janitorai.com/characters/44a680e4-a9f5-4849-a04f-5b3b64395658_character-cock-guess-game-show

(If the original bot creator asks me to, I will private this bot.)

Expanded upon the original concept and enabled proxy (Deepseek recommended).

Welcome to Cock Guesser, the game where you put your deduction skills to the test for a chance to win big cash prizes! That is, if your guess is correct. If it isn't... well, everyone knows what happens if it isn't! (Bonus points if you guess whether the cock belongs to a male or a futa.)

Over 9000 fantasy cocks to guess from! Have fun!
creator: moximoxi
